backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a construction management app with CRUD operations for Projects, Tasks, and Clients stored in hash maps with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Maps each product feature (dashboard, project management, task management, client directory, visual theme) to the frontend files and test IDs that implement them.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Construction Business App' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard (/), Projects (/projects), ProjectDetail (/projects/$id), and Clients (/clients), all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/ClientCard.tsx: Card component that displays a client's name, avatar initial, contact info, associated project badges, and an edit button with industrial styling.
frontend/src/components/ClientForm.tsx: Controlled form component for creating or editing a client with name, phone, and email fields, supporting loading state and pre-population from existing data.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout that renders the fixed Sidebar alongside a main content area and a branded footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link and a Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single project showing name, client, status badge, dates, and budget, with buttons to view tasks or edit the project.
frontend/src/components/ProjectForm.tsx: A controlled form component for creating or editing a project, with fields for name, description, status, client, dates, and budget.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Fixed sidebar navigation component with a logo, links to Dashboard, Projects, and Clients routes, and active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/TaskForm.tsx: A form component for adding a new task with fields for title, assignee, due date, and status, supporting a loading state on submit.
frontend/src/components/TaskItem.tsx: Displays a single task row with its status icon, title, assignee, due date, and a toggle button to mark it done or revert it to To Do.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects, tasks, and clients, wrapping backend actor calls with caching and invalidation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Barlow fonts, configuring Tailwind, and defining an industrial dark theme via CSS custom properties with amber/orange accents.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Clients.tsx: Clients page that lists all clients in a responsive grid with add/edit dialogs, using useGetAllClients and useCreateClient hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard overview page displaying metric cards for total projects, in-progress, completed, and clients, plus a list of upcoming active projects.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetail.tsx: Project detail page showing project metadata, tasks grouped by status (To Do, In Progress, Done), and dialogs for adding tasks and toggling task completion.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects list page with status filter tabs, a grid of ProjectCard components, and dialogs for creating new projects or editing existing project status.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom fonts (Barlow), oklch-based color tokens, border radius, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a construction business app, listing six implemented features covering dashboard, project/task/client management, industrial theming, and static asset rendering, with schema version and clarification settings.
